zh.Brockworth, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布洛可沃斯
zh.1678717, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Kendall於1410年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Stephen Kendall28歲，母親Mrs Christine Kendall27歲。他於1447年與Jane Penpons在英國可瓦爾培林特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1470年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布洛可沃斯享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Kendall于1410年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲Stephen Kendall28岁，母亲Mrs Christine Kendall27岁。他于1447年与Jane Penpons在英国可瓦爾培林特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾布洛可沃斯享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kendall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Kendal in Cumbria, which takes its name from the river Kent + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’, or from the valley of the river Kent itself.

English (of Welsh origin): from an Anglicized form of the Welsh personal name Cynddelw, which was borne by a famous 12th-century Welsh poet. It probably derives from a Celtic word meaning ‘exalted, high’ + delw ‘image, effigy’.

variants.name: Kindall
meanings: English (Middlesex): variant of   Kendall  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Kindle
meanings: English: variant of   Kendall  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Kindell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name formed with the placename element kind- ‘family, tribe’ + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Kendall was born in 1410, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Stephen Kendall, was 28 and his mother, Mrs Christine Kendall, was 27. He married Jane Penpons in 1447, in Pelynt, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1470, in Brockworth, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Kendall est né en 1410, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen Kendall, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs Christine Kendall, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Jane Penpons en 1447, à Pelynt, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1470, à Brockworth, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Kendall 1410 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen Kendall 28 und seine Mutter Mrs Christine Kendall 27. Er hat 1447 in Pelynt, Cornwall, England Jane Penpons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1470 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Brockworth, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Kendall è nato il nel 1410 nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Stephen Kendall, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Christine Kendall, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Jane Penpons nel 1447, nel Pelynt, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1470, nel Brockworth, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Kendallが1410年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Stephen Kendallは28歳，母Mrs Christine Kendallは27歳であった。1447年にイギリスコルンワルペリントでJane Penponsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブロックウオルスで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Kendall(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Kendall(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Christine Kendall(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1447년 영국 코른월 플이트에서 Jane Penpons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브록워스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Kendall nasceu em 1410, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen Kendall, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Christine Kendall, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Penpons em 1447, em Pelynt, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1470, em Brockworth, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Kendall родился в 1410 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Stephen Kendall было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Christine Kendall, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Penpons в 1447 г. в местности пелинт, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1470 г. в местности броккворт, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Kendall nació en 1410, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Stephen Kendall, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs Christine Kendall, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Jane Penpons en 1447, en Pelynt, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1470, en Brockworth, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
